title: AI Is Now Detecting Cancer Years Before Doctors Can — New 2026 Research Shows How Machine Learning Is Transforming Diagnosis
description: A 2026 Nature Cancer AI identified 18 cancer types with high accuracy from minimal slides. A Mayo Clinic AI detected pancreatic cancer up to 3 years before diagnosis — nearly doubling specialist rates.

title: Canada introduces legislation to ban social media for children under 16, regulate AI chatbots
description: The Canadian government introduced a digital safety bill on Wednesday that would ban social media for children under 16 with exemptions for platforms that ‌meet certain safety standards,...

title: Gartner analyst says AI cost management requires new tools as customer behavior drives enterprise spending
description: AI is forcing companies to rebuild cost management from scratch, as spending now depends on unpredictable customer behavior rather than fixed resources. Regulation, not cost, is also pushing many AI workloads back on-premises.

title: SLB strikes deal with Venezuela's PDVSA to modernise oil sector with AI push
description: U.S. oilfield services firm SLB has signed a long-term agreement with Venezuela's ​state oil company PDVSA to help ‌modernize and revive the OPEC nation's oil and gas sector, the company said in ​a statement on Wednesday.

title: Nvidia chips support Apple AI privacy system
description: Apple originally described PCC as a cloud AI system built with custom Apple silicon in its own data centers.
